_comment: System agent definitions for IDUNA bootstrap. Edit this file to change agent permissions. Run cmd/bootstrap to apply. All agent IDs must match migration 202606030001_system_seeds.sql.

agents.name: EMILY-PRIME
agents.description: Emily Prime — chief of staff, meta-orchestrator, CEO-facing surface

agents.name: FATBABY-EMILY
agents.description: FatBaby-Emily — domain signal intelligence for SEC/PR pipeline

agents.name: EMIREE
agents.description: Emiree — underlying state engine, peer loop with Emily Prime, strategic layer

agents.name: JON
agents.description: Jon Stockwell — options strategist, divergence engine

agents.name: BOB
agents.description: Bob — IDUNA database admin agent, migrations and schema inspection only

agents.name: TYLER
agents.description: Tyler (HARRY_HOUDINI) — self-directed RSI agent for the TYLER repo. Iduna-managed. Custody chain: TYLER → EINHORN_INDUSTRIAL → EMILY_OS. Build 0016.

agents.name: EDIS-WOOCOMMERCE
agents.description: EDIS WooCommerce hook — provisions Emily+ subscriptions in IDUNA on successful payment. One per EDIS WordPress instance.

agents.name: EMILY-TRAINING
agents.description: Emily Training — manages GPT-2 fine-tuning pipeline; uploads training data and downloads checkpoints via Google Drive API

agents.name: EDIS-CUSTODIAN
agents.description: EDIS Custodian — provisions IDUNA-managed secrets to fresh EDIS WordPress servers. Registered by emily install --edis. One custodian per EDIS instance.
